maxProcs.description: Maximum concurrent Claude CLI processes in the nest pool.

idleTimeout.description: Milliseconds an idle roost stays alive before eviction.

smallModel.description: Provider/model id used for small tasks (title generation, etc). Empty = auto-discover a free model at plugin startup.

nest.description: Default nest implementation for sessions without a per-project override. 'claude-repl' drives the interactive Ink REPL through a PTY; usage bills against Pro/Max subscription. 'claude-cli' falls back to legacy `-p` headless mode that bills against API credits — use this if you have things covered another way, or you want more suffering.

projects.description: Per-project overrides. When a session's cwd matches an entry's 'primaryPath', that entry's 'nest' wins over the top-level 'nest'. 'id' is the hum-native canonical reference.

nest.description: Override nest implementation for this project.

permissionDusk.description: Milliseconds a pending permission ask waits before auto-denying.

droned.description: Opt-in drone observer. When off, the thrum is a raw passthrough.

droneModel.description: Model the drone uses for its sentinel turns.

subpath.description: Linguistic sub-symbol addressing in read / do_code (foo.when.body, foo.try.otherwise, foo.loop.body, foo.return, etc). Off by default.

experimental.description: Experimental feature toggles. Off by default.

ccFlags.description: Claude CLI environment overrides. Each key/value is spread into the nest spawn env AFTER hum's defaults, so user entries override hum's. Use to re-enable CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_* flags hum turns off, or set arbitrary CC-facing env vars.

compaction.description: Compaction behavior for manually-triggered compaction (the 'compact' button in OC TUI). Auto-compaction is permanently off for hum models because their limit.context is set to 0 in opencode.json by install — OC's overflow check skips, no 'compacting…' hiccup, Claude CLI's native microcompaction handles overflow. 'off' (default) — manual compact stub-returns, no JSONL prune. 'curate' — manual compact triggers hum's surgical JSONL prune (strips thinking blocks, trims old tool_results). Other providers' compaction is untouched.
